description: Composition White, blue and grey striped polo T-shirt made of blended fabric, has a ribbed spread collar, short sleeves, patch pocket on the left chest, embroidered brand logo on the pocket and a vented hem Fit Authentic Fit Wash care Machine wash with similar colours at 40 degrees using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Comfortable, casual dressing at it's most sophisticated, this T-shirt from classic polo guarantees effortless style whatever the occasion, while the blended fabric offers exemplary comfort. Pair it with jeans or chinos and casual shoes. Model Statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
